subcodes.first_line: O scion of that glorious man! Your letter dated 29 October 1920 hath arrived, and all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلیل ذلک الرجل الجلیل قد وصل تحریرکم المورخ ۲۹ تشرین اول سنه ۱۹۲۰ و کل
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
